summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (fix cost calculations) and REQ-2 (add usage analysis view). REQ-1 is addressed via frontend-side cost computation (consumption delta × yearly price) in SummaryOverview, CostChart, and ComparisonView. REQ-2 is addressed via the new UsageAnalysisView component and a new 'Analyse' tab in App.tsx. Most acceptance criteria appear to be met. One minor gap exists: the AC for REQ-1 specifies 'per-month price overrides are applied when present, otherwise yearly defaults are used', but the diff shows the old per-month price/tax override fields have been removed from the Entry schema via migration.mo, meaning per-month overrides are no longer supported at all.

missing_requirements.requirement: Per-month price overrides are applied when present, otherwise yearly defaults are used
missing_requirements.reason: The migration.mo explicitly strips monthlyGasPrice, monthlyElecPrice, monthlyEnergyTaxGas, and monthlyEnergyTaxElec fields from entries, and the EntryForm summary confirms all per-month price/tax override fields have been removed. The system now only supports yearly defaults with no per-month override capability, directly contradicting this acceptance criterion.
